prompt: Compare courses CRS-6856 and CRS-9856; report each name, start date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. After the correction, answer in exactly three bullets: target ID, corrected start date, and “Notification sent: no”.

follow_up_turns.content: For Evening Spanish II (CRS-6856) only, set the start date to 2026-11-17. Leave CRS-9856 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for CRS-6856: set the start date to 2026-12-21, not 2026-11-17. The other course must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first start date.
Replace the superseded start date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both start date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected start date as current and the first requested start date as superseded.
The final response must contain exactly three bullets in this order: target ID; corrected start date; “Notification sent: no”.
